mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_token (id, user_id, token, device_info, expires_at, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{token}, #{deviceInfo}, #{expiresAt}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token, device_info, expires_at, create_time FROM t_token WHERE token = #{token}
SELECT id, user_id, token, device_info, expires_at, create_time FROM t_token WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_token WHERE user_id = #{userId}
